# Axie Tools

> TypeScript SDK and CLI for Axie Infinity marketplace automation on Ronin.

This repository performs live marketplace and blockchain operations. Treat private keys, access tokens, approvals, transfers, and buy flows as high risk.

## Primary docs

- [README](https://github.com/alexx855/axie-tools/blob/main/README.md): install flow, common tasks, API reference, and example scripts.
- [AGENTS.md](https://github.com/alexx855/axie-tools/blob/main/AGENTS.md): repo map, safety notes, common commands, and task routing.
- [Examples guide](https://github.com/alexx855/axie-tools/blob/main/examples/README.md): setup, per-script env vars, side effects, and risk levels.
- [Contributing](https://github.com/alexx855/axie-tools/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md): contributor workflow.

## Entry points

- [index.ts](https://github.com/alexx855/axie-tools/blob/main/index.ts): public library exports.
- [cli.ts](https://github.com/alexx855/axie-tools/blob/main/cli.ts): interactive CLI.
- [lib/marketplace/](https://github.com/alexx855/axie-tools/tree/main/lib/marketplace): approvals, order creation, cancellation, settlement, and token refresh.

## Safe starting points

- `getAxieFloorPrice(apiKey)`
- `getMaterialFloorPrice(materialId, apiKey, quantity?)`
- `getAxieIdsFromAccount(address, provider)`
- `getAccountInfo(address, provider, apiKey)`
- `validateMaterialToken(materialId, apiKey)`
- `getTokenExpirationInfo(token)`

## Live write operations

- `approveWETH(wallet)`
- `approveMarketplaceContract(wallet)`
- `approveMaterialMarketplace(wallet)`
- `approveBatchTransfer(wallet)`
- `buyMarketplaceOrder(...)`
- `createMarketplaceOrder(...)`
- `cancelMarketplaceOrder(...)`
- `buyMaterialOrder(...)`
- `createMaterialMarketplaceOrder(...)`
- `cancelMaterialOrder(...)`
- `transferAxie(...)`
- `batchTransferAxies(...)`

## Example scripts

- [floor-sniper.js](https://github.com/alexx855/axie-tools/blob/main/examples/floor-sniper.js): loop that watches floor price and auto-buys.
- [auto-lister.js](https://github.com/alexx855/axie-tools/blob/main/examples/auto-lister.js): lists all owned Axies using floor-based pricing.
- [settle-order.js](https://github.com/alexx855/axie-tools/blob/main/examples/settle-order.js): buy one Axie.
- [create-order.js](https://github.com/alexx855/axie-tools/blob/main/examples/create-order.js): list one Axie.
- [create-order-auction.js](https://github.com/alexx855/axie-tools/blob/main/examples/create-order-auction.js): create one auction.
- [cancel-order.js](https://github.com/alexx855/axie-tools/blob/main/examples/cancel-order.js): cancel one Axie listing.
- [material-order.js](https://github.com/alexx855/axie-tools/blob/main/examples/material-order.js): list Materials.
- [transfer-all.js](https://github.com/alexx855/axie-tools/blob/main/examples/transfer-all.js): transfer up to 100 owned Axies.
